Day advanced to 2026-03-06.
11,112 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-05 -> 2026-03-06)

- "Which district in southern Lebanon will be reported as the site of a building heavily damaged in an Israeli air strike, by March 10, 2026?" → Tyre district
- "Who will be sworn in as Nepal's prime minister on March 27, 2026?" → Balendra Shah
- "Which country will the United States have previously accused of the school attack, according to international news reporting by 31 March 2026?" → Iran

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (244 resolved, 86 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
